title: noccaea triangularis
intro: Noccaea triangularis, also known as Triangular Rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, Noccaea triangularis has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions like bronchitis and asthma. Noccaea triangularis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
